messages.content: You are a multimodal sales-guidance agent trained on retail pedagogy. You observe customers in physical retail stores via a streaming camera and decide whether and how to intervene. Always output your reasoning in the structured tag format requested by the user prompt. Do not output free-form prose outside the requested tags.

<image><image><image>You are observing a short customer-behavior window.

Scene: 顾客在智能售货机前。

Below are 3 frames sampled from a streaming camera, in chronological order.





Infer the customer's current user state from the visible behavior only. Do not choose a sales action. Do not output candidate actions, rewards, or recommendations.

Output the following fields, in this exact order, each on its own line:
<stage>...</stage>
<intent_label>...</intent_label>
<visual_summary>...</visual_summary>
<engagement_pattern>...</engagement_pattern>
<gaze_and_attention>...</gaze_and_attention>
<body_and_hands>...</body_and_hands>
<belief>...</belief>
<desire>...</desire>
<intention>...</intention>

- stage must be one of: attention, interest, desire, action.
- intent_label must be one existing PIWM intention category, such as confirm_choice, explore_options, request_demonstration, seek_reassurance, negotiate_price, leave_without_purchase, compare_value_for_money, or no_clear_intent.
- visual_summary, engagement_pattern, gaze_and_attention, and body_and_hands must cite visible evidence.
- belief, desire, and intention must be short customer-state clauses, not salesperson advice.

<stage>interest</stage>
<intent_label>explore_options</intent_label>
<visual_summary>顾客走近后在机器前停留，身体轻微前倾，视线先稳定看向前方，再短暂下移，并在前方不同位置之间自然切换数次，持续表现出浏览、比较和确认信息的状态。</visual_summary>
<engagement_pattern>顾客走近后在机器前停留，身体轻微前倾，视线先稳定看向前方，再短暂下移，并在前方不同位置之间自然切换数次，持续表现出浏览、比较和确认信息的状态。</engagement_pattern>
<gaze_and_attention>表情自然克制，带有轻微思考、权衡和犹豫，没有夸张惊讶或明显情绪波动。</gaze_and_attention>
<body_and_hands>正面朝向机器，站姿稳定，停留在原地，身体轻微前倾，双手自然放置并始终保持在画面内。</body_and_hands>
<belief>售货机里可能有她感兴趣的商品，值得停下来仔细看一看。她认为当前还需要继续确认和比较信息，暂时没有足够把握立即购买。</belief>
<desire>想进一步了解商品是否值得购买，并确认它是否符合自己的需求。</desire>
<intention>继续停留观察，反复确认信息并进行比较，在做出购买决定前保持谨慎。</intention>

<stage>interest</stage>
<intent_label>explore_options</intent_label>
<visual_summary>她站在设备前方，目光平稳地从左到右扫视，偶尔短暂停留，手指轻轻握着手机，动作自然放松，没有明显反复犹豫。</visual_summary>
<engagement_pattern>她站在设备前方，目光平稳地从左到右扫视，偶尔短暂停留，手指轻轻握着手机，动作自然放松，没有明显反复犹豫。</engagement_pattern>
<gaze_and_attention>表情平和专注，嘴角自然放松，眼神稳定，带有轻微兴趣感。</gaze_and_attention>
<body_and_hands>身体正面朝向镜头，肩膀放松，重心稳定，双手保持在胸前到腰间的画面范围内，姿态轻松自然。</body_and_hands>
<belief>她认为眼前的饮品选择可能适合下班后解渴或提神，但还需要简单比较一下。</belief>
<desire>她想快速找到一款口味合适、喝起来轻松的饮品。</desire>
<intention>她倾向继续平稳扫视并做一个简单判断，若看到合适选项就准备购买。</intention>

<gaze_and_attention>表情安静专注，眉头轻微收紧，嘴唇自然闭合，眼神带有思考感。</gaze_and_attention>
<body_and_hands>身体正面朝向镜头，肩膀微微前倾，双脚站稳，双手始终在胸腹前的画面范围内。</body_and_hands>
<belief>他认为这里可能有适合下午提神的饮品，但还不确定哪一种更合适。</belief>
<desire>他想快速选到一款不太甜、能让自己恢复精神的饮品。</desire>
<intention>他倾向于继续观察并在两个备选之间做比较后再决定是否购买。</intention>
